# ggblanket

## Objective

ggblanket is a package of ggplot2 wrapper functions for
publication-quality visualisation. It seeks to support well-designed
visualisation, while aligning as much as possible with ggplot2 and
tidyverse conventions.

## Installation

Install from CRAN, or development version from
[GitHub](https://github.com/).

``` r

install.packages("ggblanket") 
pak::pak("davidhodge931/ggblanket")
```

## Example

``` r

library(ggblanket2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

set_blanket()

iris |>
  gg_point(
    x = Sepal.Width,
    y = Sepal.Length,
    fill = Species,
    shape = Species,
  )
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-2-1.png)

``` r

ggplot2::economics_long |>
  gg_area(
    x = date,
    y = value01,
    facet_wrap = variable,
  )
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-3-1.png)

## How it works

Use the `gg_*()` wrapper functions to:

- Plot a ggplot and geom layer in a single function
- Map aesthetic and facet variables as bare names
- Get `colour` and `colour_*` arguments inherited from `fill` and
  `fill_*` arguments
- Change scale arguments easily with prefixed arguments
- If lower x/y scale limit is zero, get default scale expansion of
  `ggplot2::expansion(c(0, 0.5))`
- Annotate outside the panel easier with `coord_clip = "off"` default
- Access to other arguments within relevant `geom_*` function via `...`
- Get global
  [`set_blanket()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/set_blanket.md)
  setting defaults.

Use the global setup function,
[`set_blanket()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/set_blanket.md),
to:

- Adjust the global theme
- Adjust the global option for how themes are to be refined based on
  plot scale types etc
- Adjust the global theme `fill`, `colour`, `linewidth`, `shape`,
  `linetype`, `size`, `stroke`
- Adjust the global theme `fill_palette`, `colour_palette`,
  `shape_palette` and `linetype_palette`
- Adjust the global option for `colour_border`, which is a function to
  transform the `colour` and `colour_palette` with input of the `fill`
  and `fill_palette` respectively
- Adjust the global option for `fill_border`, which is a function to
  transform the `fill` and `fill_palette` with input of the `colour` and
  `colour_palette` respectively

## Other packages

This package is part of a group of related packages built to extend
[ggplot2](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org).

|  |  |  |  |  |  |
|:--:|:--:|:--:|:--:|:--:|:--:|
| [![ggblanket](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/davidhodge931/ggblanket/main/man/figures/logo.svg)](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/) | [![ggrefine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/davidhodge931/ggrefine/main/man/figures/logo.svg)](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggrefine/) | [![ggscribe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/davidhodge931/ggscribe/main/man/figures/logo.svg)](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggscribe/) | [![ggwidth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/davidhodge931/ggwidth/main/man/figures/logo.svg)](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggwidth/) | [![blends](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/davidhodge931/blends/main/man/figures/logo.svg)](https://davidhodge931.github.io/blends/) | [![jumble](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/davidhodge931/jumble/main/man/figures/logo.svg)](https://davidhodge931.github.io/jumble/) |

# Package index

- [`set_blanket()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/set_blanket.md)
  : Set ggblanket defaults
- [`gg_blanket()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_blanket.md)
  : Any ggplot
- [`gg_area()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_area.md)
  : Area ggplot
- [`gg_bar()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_bar.md)
  : Bar ggplot
- [`gg_bin2d()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_bin2d.md)
  : Bin2d ggplot
- [`gg_boxplot()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_boxplot.md)
  : Boxplot ggplot
- [`gg_col()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_col.md)
  : Col ggplot
- [`gg_contour()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_contour.md)
  : Contour ggplot
- [`gg_contour_filled()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_contour_filled.md)
  : Contour filled ggplot
- [`gg_crossbar()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_crossbar.md)
  : Crossbar ggplot
- [`gg_density()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_density.md)
  : Density ggplot
- [`gg_density2d()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_density2d.md)
  : Density 2d ggplot
- [`gg_density2d_filled()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_density2d_filled.md)
  : Density 2d filled ggplot
- [`gg_errorbar()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_errorbar.md)
  : Errorbar ggplot
- [`gg_freqpoly()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_freqpoly.md)
  : Freqpoly ggplot
- [`gg_hex()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_hex.md)
  : Hex ggplot
- [`gg_histogram()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_histogram.md)
  : Histogram ggplot
- [`gg_jitter()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_jitter.md)
  : Jitter ggplot
- [`gg_line()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_line.md)
  : Line ggplot
- [`gg_linerange()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_linerange.md)
  : Linerange ggplot
- [`gg_path()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_path.md)
  : Path ggplot
- [`gg_point()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_point.md)
  : Point ggplot
- [`gg_polygon()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_polygon.md)
  : Polygon ggplot
- [`gg_qq()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_qq.md)
  : QQ ggplot
- [`gg_quantile()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_quantile.md)
  : Quantile ggplot
- [`gg_raster()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_raster.md)
  : Raster ggplot
- [`gg_rect()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_rect.md)
  : Rect ggplot
- [`gg_ribbon()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_ribbon.md)
  : Ribbon ggplot
- [`gg_segment()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_segment.md)
  : Segment ggplot
- [`gg_sf()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_sf.md)
  : Sf ggplot
- [`gg_smooth()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_smooth.md)
  : Smooth ggplot
- [`gg_spoke()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_spoke.md)
  : Spoke ggplot
- [`gg_step()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_step.md)
  : Step ggplot
- [`gg_tile()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_tile.md)
  : Tile ggplot
- [`gg_violin()`](https://davidhodge931.github.io/ggblanket/reference/gg_violin.md)
  : Violin ggplot
